overview: Newton's Institute of Science and Technology (NIST) is a private technical institution located in Alugurajupally, Macherla, Guntur district, Andhra Pradesh. Established in 2010 by Lincoln's Educational Society, the campus covers 35 acres of landscaped grounds featuring a modern layout with dedicated administrative and academic infrastructure. The institute focuses on professional engineering and management education, delivering career-focused learning designed to prepare local technical talent for the IT and core corporate sectors.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Kakinada (JNTUK).

placements.placementRate: Approximately 50% – 80% depending on the engineering branch (with CSE leading placement shares)
placements.totalOffers: Multiple mass recruitment offers across batch sizes
placements.companiesVisited: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), Wipro, Infosys, HCL Technologies, Cisco, Tech Mahindra
placements.internshipHighlights: Internship opportunities are arranged through specialized corporate programs and industrial training tie-ups

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are governed by the Andhra Pradesh State Council of Higher Education (APSCHE). Candidates secure seats via the state-level entrance exam counseling system or through institutional management quota provisions according to government norm eligibility.
admissions.importantDates: Schedules line up directly with APSCHE state counseling dates, generally running from May through August annually.

campus.specialNote: Hostel accommodations focus on essential amenities and regular student messing arrangements inside a safe campus boundary.

hostelFees.5SharingNonAC: Available under base layout pricing plans

contact.address: Newton's Institute of Science and Technology, Alugurajupally, Koppunoor Post, Macherla, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh – 522426, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee exemptions mapped to ranks secured in state entrance examinations like AP EAPCET.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Subject to state regulations under top merit rankings criteria.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Available via specific institutional merit criteria decisions.
scholarships.governmentAid: Eligible candidates can claim full or partial tuition reimbursement under the Government of Andhra Pradesh Jagananna Amma Vodi / Vidya Deevena schemes (AP ePASS fee concessions).
